stripe.P1_rationale: API billing, consumption model, Stripe Issuing native, x402 via ACP with OpenAI, programmatic everything
stripe.G1_rationale: Per-key RBAC (restricted keys), immutable audit log (Events API), SOC 2 Type II, PCI-DSS L1, SCIM, data residency, webhook coverage for all mutations
stripe.W1_rationale: Dashboard is well-structured React app, good semantic HTML, keyboard-navigable. Minor: some custom chart components lack ARIA. Full API parity.

resend.P1_rationale: Self-serve credit card via web, usage-based billing, API key management. No x402 but straightforward automation.
resend.G1_rationale: API key scoping (send-only, full access), team management, basic activity logs. Missing granular RBAC and audit log export.
resend.W1_rationale: Clean, modern dashboard. Good semantic structure. Minimal JS complexity. API parity strong.

clerk.P1_rationale: Self-serve billing, usage-based (MAU), credit card via web form. No API billing management.
clerk.G1_rationale: Per-key permissions, RBAC for organizations, audit logs, SOC 2 Type II, SCIM, SSO/SAML. Strong governance.
clerk.W1_rationale: Dashboard is React SPA with decent accessibility. Most forms labeled. Some custom components without ARIA.

algolia.P1_rationale: Self-serve plan with credit card. Enterprise requires sales. Usage-based pricing available.
algolia.G1_rationale: API key scoping (search-only, admin, custom), team management, analytics/logs, SOC 2, multiple data centers for residency.
algolia.W1_rationale: Dashboard functional but complex SPA. Search-specific UI patterns. API parity good.

meilisearch.P1_rationale: Meilisearch Cloud is self-serve with simple pricing. Open-source option = zero payment. Straightforward card form.
meilisearch.G1_rationale: API key scoping (search, admin, custom). Basic team features. No audit logs. No compliance certs listed for cloud.
meilisearch.W1_rationale: Clean dashboard, semantic HTML. Simple UI. Good keyboard navigation.

typesense.P1_rationale: Typesense Cloud self-serve billing. Usage-based. Credit card via web. Open-source option also.
typesense.G1_rationale: API key scoping. Basic access controls. No audit logs or compliance certs publicly documented for cloud.

vercel.P1_rationale: API billing management, usage-based, credit card via API. Team billing programmatic. Strong automation path.
vercel.G1_rationale: Team RBAC, API token scoping, audit logs (enterprise), SOC 2, SSO/SAML. Deploy protection controls.
vercel.W1_rationale: Dashboard is polished React app. Good semantic structure. Some complex deployment UI components. API does ~95% of what dashboard does.

postmark.P1_rationale: Self-serve credit card billing. Usage-based (per email). Clear pricing. No API billing management.
postmark.G1_rationale: API token scoping (server tokens, account tokens), activity logs, data processing agreement. SOC 2 compliance.
postmark.W1_rationale: Clean, well-structured dashboard. Good semantic HTML. Simple forms.

cal-com.P1_rationale: Open-source self-hosted = free. Cloud is self-serve. Simple card billing. Open core model reduces payment friction.
cal-com.G1_rationale: Basic API keys. Team management. No granular RBAC. No audit logs. Limited compliance documentation.
cal-com.W1_rationale: Modern Next.js app with good accessibility basics. Semantic forms. Some complex scheduling UI.

lemon-squeezy.P1_rationale: Self-serve billing platform. Usage/revenue based. Credit card via web.
lemon-squeezy.G1_rationale: API keys, basic team roles. No audit log export. Limited compliance documentation.
lemon-squeezy.W1_rationale: Dashboard functional. Standard web forms. Some areas require visual interpretation of charts.

posthog.P1_rationale: Self-serve with generous free tier. Usage-based pricing. Open-source self-hosted option. Credit card via web.
posthog.G1_rationale: Project-level API keys, team RBAC, activity log (enterprise), SOC 2 Type II. Data residency (US/EU).
posthog.W1_rationale: React SPA dashboard. Good semantic structure. API parity for most features.

anthropic.P1_rationale: Self-serve API billing. Usage-based. Credit card via web. Auto-recharge. Prepay credits available.
anthropic.G1_rationale: API key per workspace. Usage limits. Basic team management. SOC 2 Type II. No granular RBAC per key.
anthropic.W1_rationale: Console is minimal. API-first company. Dashboard is secondary to API. Limited web-only features.

digital-ocean.P1_rationale: Self-serve billing. API for infrastructure management. Credit card via web. Usage-based for most services.
digital-ocean.G1_rationale: Team management, API token scoping, basic audit logs, SOC 2/ISO 27001. Data center selection for residency.
digital-ocean.W1_rationale: Dashboard is complex SPA. Infrastructure management UI. API parity good but UI has more features.

render.P1_rationale: Self-serve billing. Credit card via web. Usage-based pricing. Simple pricing model.
render.G1_rationale: API keys, team management. No audit logs. Limited compliance documentation. No RBAC granularity.
render.W1_rationale: Clean dashboard. Good basics. Some deploy-specific UI complexity.

sendgrid.P1_rationale: Self-serve with credit card. Usage-based. But owned by Twilio now — pricing can be complex. Plan upgrades may need dashboard.
sendgrid.G1_rationale: API key scoping (mail send, full access, custom), team management, activity feed, SOC 2. Twilio's compliance umbrella.
sendgrid.W1_rationale: Older dashboard design. Functional but not modern. Some accessibility gaps. Transitioning to Twilio UI.

segment.P1_rationale: Free tier available. Paid plans require sales/demo for higher tiers. Business tier is sales-led.
segment.G1_rationale: Workspace RBAC, API tokens, audit trail, SOC 2, HIPAA eligible, GDPR. Twilio compliance umbrella. Data residency.
segment.W1_rationale: Dashboard is functional SPA. Good structure. Complex source/destination configuration UI.

square.P1_rationale: Self-serve developer account. Payment processing fees (no monthly). API-heavy. OAuth for merchants.
square.G1_rationale: OAuth scoping, application-level permissions, webhook events, PCI-DSS, SOC 2. Good audit via transaction logs.
square.W1_rationale: Developer dashboard is adequate. Merchant dashboard is more complex. Some custom components.

firebase-auth.P1_rationale: Free tier generous (50K MAU). Paid via Google Cloud billing. API-manageable. Usage-based.
firebase-auth.G1_rationale: Google Cloud IAM integration, per-service account keys, Cloud Audit Logs, SOC 2/ISO 27001, data residency via GCP regions.
firebase-auth.W1_rationale: Firebase Console is Google's standard UI. Functional. Some complex SPA patterns.

auth0.P1_rationale: Free tier available. Self-serve billing for Developer tier. Enterprise is sales-led.
auth0.G1_rationale: Extensive RBAC, custom roles, audit logs with export, SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA, ISO 27001, SCIM, SSO, data residency. Enterprise-grade.
auth0.W1_rationale: Dashboard is functional SPA. Complex auth configuration UI. Decent accessibility.

google-calendar.P1_rationale: Free for personal. Google Workspace pricing is self-serve. API access via GCP (free tier available).
google-calendar.G1_rationale: Google Workspace admin: RBAC, audit logs, data residency, SOC 2/ISO 27001, SCIM, DLP controls.
google-calendar.W1_rationale: Google Calendar web UI is well-built but complex SPA. API parity is good for most operations.

openai.P1_rationale: Self-serve API billing. Usage-based. Credit card via web. Auto-recharge. Prepay credits.
openai.G1_rationale: API key per project, usage limits per key. Basic team roles. SOC 2 Type II. No granular RBAC per key.
openai.W1_rationale: Playground/dashboard is functional but secondary to API. Limited web-only features.

replicate.P1_rationale: Self-serve, pay-per-prediction. Usage-based. Credit card via web. Simple pricing.
replicate.G1_rationale: API tokens, basic team features. No audit logs. Limited compliance documentation.
replicate.W1_rationale: Clean web dashboard. Simple UI. Good basics.

cohere.P1_rationale: Self-serve API billing. Usage-based. Free tier available. Credit card via web.
cohere.G1_rationale: API keys, basic team management. SOC 2 Type II. Limited RBAC granularity.

together-ai.P1_rationale: Self-serve API billing. Usage-based. Credit card via web. Simple pricing.
together-ai.G1_rationale: API keys, basic team features. Limited compliance documentation.

adyen.P1_rationale: Enterprise/sales-led primarily. Self-serve available but complex onboarding. High minimum volumes.
adyen.G1_rationale: PCI-DSS Level 1, SOC 2, extensive audit logs, RBAC, data residency (multi-region), regulatory compliance across jurisdictions.
adyen.W1_rationale: Enterprise dashboard. Complex but functional. Good governance UI.

mixpanel.P1_rationale: Self-serve with free tier. Usage-based pricing. Credit card via web. Growth plan is self-serve.
mixpanel.G1_rationale: Project-level access, team RBAC, data governance, SOC 2 Type II. EU data residency option.
mixpanel.W1_rationale: Dashboard is complex analytics SPA. Functional but chart-heavy (visual interpretation needed).

netlify.P1_rationale: Self-serve billing. Generous free tier. Usage-based. Credit card via web.
netlify.G1_rationale: Team management, API access, basic audit log (enterprise). SOC 2. Limited RBAC granularity.
netlify.W1_rationale: Clean dashboard. Modern UI. Good basics. Some deploy-specific complexity.

elasticsearch.P1_rationale: Elastic Cloud self-serve. Usage-based. Open-source self-hosted option. Credit card via web.
elasticsearch.G1_rationale: API keys with scoping, RBAC, audit logging, SOC 2/ISO 27001, HIPAA eligible. Data residency (multi-region).
elasticsearch.W1_rationale: Kibana dashboard is complex SPA. Feature-rich but heavy. Good for API use.

bluesky-api.P1_rationale: Free API. AT Protocol is open. No payment required for API access. Self-hosted option.
bluesky-api.G1_rationale: App passwords for API access. No RBAC, no audit logs, no compliance certifications. Early-stage.
bluesky-api.W1_rationale: Web client is React with good semantic structure. Open protocol. Good accessibility basics.

mailgun.P1_rationale: Self-serve billing. Usage-based. Credit card via web. Plans can be complex.
mailgun.G1_rationale: API keys, basic domain-level access, activity logs. SOC 2. Limited RBAC.
mailgun.W1_rationale: Older dashboard design. Functional but dated. Some accessibility gaps.

amazon-ses.P1_rationale: AWS billing (API-manageable). Usage-based. Part of AWS account. Complex but automated.
amazon-ses.G1_rationale: AWS IAM (granular RBAC), CloudTrail audit logs, SOC 2/ISO 27001/HIPAA, multi-region, SCIM via AWS SSO.
amazon-ses.W1_rationale: AWS Console is complex, heavy SPA. Many unlabeled elements. Not designed for agent navigation.

calendly.P1_rationale: Self-serve billing. Credit card via web. Standard SaaS pricing tiers.
calendly.G1_rationale: Team management, OAuth scoping, basic activity. SOC 2. Limited RBAC granularity.
calendly.W1_rationale: Dashboard is clean modern app. Good form structure. Some scheduling widget complexity.

huggingface.P1_rationale: Generous free tier. Pro/Enterprise self-serve. Usage-based for inference. Credit card via web.
huggingface.G1_rationale: API tokens, organization management. Limited RBAC. No audit logs. Basic compliance.
huggingface.W1_rationale: Good semantic HTML. Model hub is well-structured. Community-oriented UI.

pipedrive.P1_rationale: Self-serve billing with credit card. Per-seat pricing. Higher tiers may need sales.
pipedrive.G1_rationale: API tokens, team roles (admin/regular). Basic activity log. SOC 2. Limited RBAC.
pipedrive.W1_rationale: CRM dashboard. Functional but complex pipeline UI. Some custom components.

aws.P1_rationale: API billing, usage-based, credit card manageable via API. Complex but fully automated path.
aws.G1_rationale: IAM is industry gold standard. Per-action RBAC, CloudTrail, Config, GuardDuty, multi-region, SOC 2/ISO/HIPAA/FedRAMP, SCIM, SSO.
aws.W1_rationale: AWS Console is notoriously complex. Heavy SPA, inconsistent UI patterns across services. Not agent-friendly.

okta.P1_rationale: Enterprise-first pricing. Developer tier exists but paid tiers are sales-heavy. Complex pricing.
okta.G1_rationale: Identity IS governance. RBAC/ABAC, audit logs, compliance suite (SOC 2/ISO/HIPAA/FedRAMP), SCIM, universal SSO.
okta.W1_rationale: Admin dashboard is functional enterprise app. Complex but structured. Heavy JS.

amplitude.P1_rationale: Free tier available. Growth/Enterprise require demo. Credit card for starter.
amplitude.G1_rationale: Team RBAC, project-level access, audit logs (enterprise), SOC 2, HIPAA eligible, EU hosting.
amplitude.W1_rationale: Analytics dashboard. Chart-heavy, requires visual interpretation. Complex SPA.

microsoft-outlook.P1_rationale: Microsoft 365 self-serve billing. API via Graph. Credit card via web. Complex licensing.
microsoft-outlook.G1_rationale: Azure AD/Entra, granular RBAC, unified audit log, SOC 2/ISO 27001/HIPAA/FedRAMP, SCIM, data residency.
microsoft-outlook.W1_rationale: Outlook web is complex. Microsoft 365 admin is heavy. Enterprise-focused UI.

braintree.P1_rationale: Self-serve sandbox. Production requires PayPal business account. Merchant onboarding process.
braintree.G1_rationale: PCI-DSS Level 1, SOC 2, transaction-level audit, role-based access on merchant account. PayPal compliance umbrella.
braintree.W1_rationale: Older dashboard design. PayPal integration complexity. Some dated UI patterns.

heroku.P1_rationale: Self-serve billing. Credit card via web. Usage-based for dynos. Part of Salesforce now.
heroku.G1_rationale: Team/enterprise spaces, API tokens. SOC 2 via Salesforce. Limited audit logging.
heroku.W1_rationale: Dashboard is clean but limited. Mostly CLI-driven. Web UI is secondary.

cognito.P1_rationale: AWS billing (API-manageable). Usage-based (per MAU). Part of AWS account.
cognito.G1_rationale: AWS IAM integration, CloudTrail, SOC 2/ISO/HIPAA. Granular RBAC via IAM policies.
cognito.W1_rationale: AWS Console is complex. Cognito-specific UI is functional but heavy.

heap.P1_rationale: Free tier. Growth/Pro require demo/sales contact. Limited self-serve.
heap.G1_rationale: Team management, project access controls, audit log (enterprise). SOC 2.
heap.W1_rationale: Analytics dashboard. Chart-heavy. Requires visual interpretation.

paypal.P1_rationale: Business account self-serve. But complex onboarding, identity verification required. Payments API is good once set up.
paypal.G1_rationale: PCI-DSS, SOC 2. Transaction-level logging. Basic role management. Complex account structure.
paypal.W1_rationale: Dashboard is complex, older design. Many verification/CAPTCHA steps. Not agent-friendly.

copper.P1_rationale: Self-serve billing with credit card. Per-seat pricing. Standard SaaS.
copper.G1_rationale: Basic API key. Team roles (admin/member). Limited audit trail. SOC 2.
copper.W1_rationale: CRM dashboard. Google Workspace integration. Standard web app.

salesforce.P1_rationale: Enterprise-first. Sales-led pricing. Annual contracts. No self-serve for most products.
salesforce.G1_rationale: Industry-leading governance: granular RBAC (profiles/permission sets), Shield for audit trail/encryption, SOC 2/ISO/HIPAA/FedRAMP, multi-region, field-level security.
salesforce.W1_rationale: Lightning Experience is complex SPA. Many custom components. Enterprise-heavy UI. API parity is excellent though.

hubspot.P1_rationale: Free tier. Self-serve for Starter. Professional/Enterprise require demo or sales.
hubspot.G1_rationale: API key scoping, team RBAC, audit logs (enterprise), SOC 2. Good CRM-level access controls.
hubspot.W1_rationale: Dashboard is functional but complex CRM SPA. Many custom UI elements.

twitter-api.P1_rationale: Free tier extremely limited. Basic tier $100/mo via web. Pro $5K/mo+ requires agreement. Enterprise is sales-led.
twitter-api.G1_rationale: OAuth app management. No RBAC. Minimal audit trail. No compliance certifications for API consumers.
twitter-api.W1_rationale: Developer portal is functional. X (Twitter) web UI has anti-bot measures.

zoho-crm.P1_rationale: Self-serve billing. Credit card. Standard SaaS tiers. Free tier available.
zoho-crm.G1_rationale: Team RBAC, profile-based permissions, audit trail, SOC 2. Data residency options.
zoho-crm.W1_rationale: Complex CRM dashboard. Heavy SPA. Some accessibility issues. Many custom components.

linkedin-api.P1_rationale: API access requires partnership/application approval. LinkedIn Marketing Solutions is sales-led. Very restricted.
linkedin-api.G1_rationale: OAuth scoping. No granular RBAC for API consumers. LinkedIn's compliance is platform-level, not consumer-facing.
linkedin-api.W1_rationale: LinkedIn web has anti-bot detection. Dashboard limited for API consumers. Not agent-friendly.

when2meet.P1_rationale: Completely free. No payment required. No account required. Zero payment friction.
when2meet.G1_rationale: No API. No access controls. No audit trail. No compliance. Just a web page.
when2meet.W1_rationale: Simple HTML interface. But custom time-grid requires visual/mouse interaction. No API.
